subject: Migrate pap startup & controllers to spring boot
commit_message:
Migrate pap startup & controllers to spring boot

This commit migrates pap config, startup and controllers to spring boot.

Change-Id: Icf91d728160a23db614dfba6b40ddccd2f6163a5
Issue-ID: POLICY-3754
Signed-off-by: a.sreekumar <ajith.sreekumar@bell.ca>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 2: Patch Set 1 was rebased.

Patch Set 13:

(8 comments)

Are there any differences on functionality with the previous release Ajith?
One idea due to its size is to do a code walkthrough to make it easier for folks to review and to speed it up, it could be done in policy weekly if you would like to entertain the idea and there's time in the agenda.

Patch Set 14:

(9 comments)

> Patch Set 13:
> 
> (8 comments)
> 
> Are there any differences on functionality with the previous release Ajith?
> One idea due to its size is to do a code walkthrough to make it easier for folks to review and to speed it up, it could be done in policy weekly if you would like to entertain the idea and there's time in the agenda.

No everything should work exactly like today, except minor change in api for prometheus metrics.
It is changed from <host>:<port>/metrics to <host>:<port>/actuator/prometheus. All spring boot applications have these predefined endpoints where the metrics etc. are exposed.

Code walkthrough would be a good idea, but I am only available until end of today. From tomorrow I am going on vacation. Today during the daily scrum time, or committers call or anytime in between I am good to do it if any of these times suites.

Patch Set 14:

> Patch Set 14:
> 
> (9 comments)
> 
> > Patch Set 13:
> > 
> > (8 comments)
> > 
> > Are there any differences on functionality with the previous release Ajith?
> > One idea due to its size is to do a code walkthrough to make it easier for folks to review and to speed it up, it could be done in policy weekly if you would like to entertain the idea and there's time in the agenda.
> 
> No everything should work exactly like today, except minor change in api for prometheus metrics.
> It is changed from <host>:<port>/metrics to <host>:<port>/actuator/prometheus. All spring boot applications have these predefined endpoints where the metrics etc. are exposed.
> 
> Code walkthrough would be a good idea, but I am only available until end of today. From tomorrow I am going on vacation. Today during the daily scrum time, or committers call or anytime in between I am good to do it if any of these times suites.

Thanks for the feedback Ajith.  Could we remap the /actuator/prometheus URL to /metrics as it is the prometheus default for scraping an endpoint?  see from https://prometheus.io/docs/prometheus/latest/configuration/configuration/ :

# The HTTP resource path on which to fetch metrics from targets.
[ metrics_path: <path> | default = /metrics ]

This is a post about changing it:

https://stackoverflow.com/questions/51195237/custom-path-for-prometheus-actuator
